ab: Halasan azak haip tu tingmut munhaan pasnanava’an.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: Maaq tu tunahaan azak pasnanava’an qai, panpungul azaK madas kavaang.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: Nii azak minadas ma’aqma’aq tu qaimangsut.
en: I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: Maaq tu isnava’an azak qai, muskun azak u’uskunan saduu patasan.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: Maaq tu palatanam mapatas qai, pasimulan azak u’uskunan ispapatas siin isqaqaisqais.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: Tupa’un azak masnanava tu, “Tingmuta muqnin min’anuqu, kaa’in halasan!"
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
